hero.title: BlinnyKing brings Tallinn-style pancake comfort to your everyday lunch and late-night cravings.
hero.subtitle: Fresh savory and sweet bliny, quick pickup, and cozy dine-in vibes from Jüri.

footer.tagline: Warm food, kind service, and stacks worth coming back for.

home.popularTitle: Popular dishes people actually come back for
home.popularDescription: Four hero products to anchor the preview and show the tone of the menu.
home.lunchDescription: Soup, mini savory pancake and side salad. Made for nearby workers who need something fast but still warm and proper.

steps.oneText: Pick savory, sweet or lunch sets with clear portions and sizes.
steps.twoText: Preview flow supports both modes with location and checkout steps.
steps.threeText: Discounts, stamps and repeat-order UX encourage regular lunch traffic.

home.loyaltyText: Preview includes a simple hook: lunch club, returning customer perks and discount placement that feels premium instead of spammy.
home.findDescription: Designed around one real location now, with room to scale into more later.
home.reviewsTitle: Mock social proof that feels plausible
home.reviewsDescription: Enough for a convincing preview without faking a production feed.

cards.loyaltyText: Collect stamps on every order and unlock a free sweet bliny after 6 visits.
cards.deliveryText: Built for takeaway, pickup and quick lunch delivery around Jüri.

menuPage.title: Menu built for browsing fast on mobile
menuPage.description: Five categories, clear cards and enough information to support a believable preview ordering flow.

cart.title: Simple checkout preview with pickup or delivery
cart.description: Mock Stripe block only — no real keys, no live payment flow.
cart.stripeText: Card fields and payment intent are intentionally mocked for preview only.

about.title: A warm modern brand, not fake nostalgia
about.description: The preview leans into comfort food, clean surfaces and enough soul to feel intentional.
about.text1: BlinnyKing is imagined as a modern neighborhood pancake house: fast enough for weekday lunch, warm enough for a family stop, and visually clean enough to avoid the cheap delivery-app look. The brand story centers on generous fillings, soft hospitality and a menu built around repeat cravings instead of novelty gimmicks.
about.text2: This preview uses editorial spacing, earthy colors and food-led blocks so the identity feels premium but still approachable.

locationsPage.title: Built around Jüri, ready for the next spot
locationsPage.description: The first location is real in structure, the second is a clean expansion placeholder.

partnersPage.title: B2B inquiry page for offices, events and wholesale
partnersPage.description: Structured for catering leads, office lunch agreements or co-branded popups.
partnersPage.idea: Tell us about your volume, event or partnership idea

jobsPage.title: Hiring blocks for a growing neighborhood food brand
jobsPage.description: Two mock positions plus a lightweight application form.

contactsPage.title: Contact page with map placeholder and real-world structure
contactsPage.description: Enough detail for preview review without wiring live embeds or social APIs.

account.title: Demo login, profile and order history
account.description: A polished demo account flow for preview purposes without a real backend.
account.name: Full name
account.guestHint: Use any email and password — this is a demo login stored only in your browser.
account.emptyHistory: Your next orders will appear here.

data.review1: The savory pancakes taste homemade in the best possible way. Fast pickup too.
data.review2: Lunch combo is crazy good value and the place feels warm, not generic.
data.review3: Sweet bliny with berries was actually beautiful, not just sugar overload.
data.job1Description: Prepare pancakes, maintain prep station quality and keep service smooth during rush hours.
data.job2Description: Welcome guests, manage takeaway flow and coordinate delivery pickup timing.
data.location1Note: Main preview location with dine-in, takeaway and delivery zone.
data.location2Note: Structure reserved for the next opening.
